description_long: This is a classic black frying pan with a wide, shallow circular cooking surface and a gently sloped rim. The pan features a single, elongated handle that is slightly curved for ergonomic grip, with a visible hanging hole at the end for convenient storage. The surface of the pan appears smooth and non-stick, likely made from coated metal, and the handle is seamlessly integrated into the body. The rim is thin and straight, without any pouring spouts or reinforced edges, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance. The bottom of the pan is smooth, lacking any visible ridges, patterns, or brand stamps. No visible brand logo or markings are present on either the pan or the handle.
description: A sleek black frying pan with a smooth, non-stick surface and a single ergonomic handle featuring a hanging hole. The pan has a thin, straight rim and a plain, unmarked bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular pan surface and the handle with a hanging hole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shallow depth of the pan and the gentle curve of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle and the full circular shape of the pan.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the pan's smooth surface and the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Single, slightly curved handle made of plastic or coated metal, ergonomic, with a hanging hole at the end and a smooth surface.
attribute_rim_design: Thin, straight rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand markings.
